summary: FIESTA - Future-ready Intelligent Event Solution for Tracking & Assessment. A complete event planning platform featuring event creation, organizer discovery with contact-based communication, side-by-side comparison tools, booking management, reviews, and admin analytics. Built with Motoko backend and React + TypeScript frontend on the Internet Computer.
architectural_notes: Backend: Motoko with actor-based architecture for Internet Computer deployment
Frontend: React + TypeScript with responsive design and component-based structure
Data persistence: Stable variables in Motoko for user, event, organizer, booking, and review data
Authentication: Secure password hashing with role-based access control (guest, organizer, admin)
Contact-based communication: Contact numbers as primary organizer identifiers
Comparison system: Multi-select organizers with sortable table by rating, experience, and pricing
Database schema: Users, Events, Organizers (with contact_number), Portfolio, Bookings, Reviews tables
UI theme: Navy + White + Gold accent with rounded cards, soft shadows, and elegant typography
Security: Input validation, session management, and role-based route protection
Event types: Wedding, Birthday, Anniversary, Corporate with location and style variations
known_issues: Portfolio images not displaying for organizers

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication system with three roles (guest, organizer, admin) using Internet Identity integration. Store user profiles with full_name, email (case-sensitive), role, and created_at timestamp in backend state.

Create event creation and management system where guests can create events with event_type (Wedding, Birthday, Anniversary, Corporate), location_type (Home, Destination), number_of_guests (integer), and event_style (Family, Couple, Friends, Corporate). Link events to user_id and store created_at timestamp.

Build organizer profile management system with company_name, contact_number (unique, case-sensitive, primary communication identifier), experience_years (integer), pricing_range (text), rating (real, default 0), total_reviews (integer, default 0), availability_status (Available or Busy), description (text), and created_at timestamp. Link organizer profiles to user_id.

Implement intelligent filtering system that allows guests to filter organizers based on event requirements (event_type, location_type, number_of_guests, event_style) and displays filtered results as a list of organizer cards showing company name, contact number, experience, pricing, rating, and availability.

Create side-by-side organizer comparison tool where guests can select multiple organizers via checkboxes and view a comparison table with columns: Company Name, Contact Number (bold and highlighted), Experience, Pricing, Rating, and Availability. Include sorting options by rating, experience, and pricing. Ensure contact numbers are prominently displayed.

Build booking request system where guests can request bookings with organizers for specific events. Store bookings with booking_status (Requested, Approved, Rejected, Completed), booking_date timestamp, and links to event_id and organizer_id. Guests can view booking status.

Implement organizer booking management interface where organizers can view incoming booking requests, accept or reject bookings, and update booking status. Display requester information and event details for each booking request.

Implement admin analytics dashboard displaying: total user count, total organizer count, total event count, most popular event type (with count), and highest rated organizer (with rating). Include basic visual analytics presentation.

Design premium landing page with hero section featuring the FIESTA branding, elegant typography, soft shadows, rounded cards, and navy + white + gold accent color scheme. Include clear call-to-action for registration and value proposition messaging.

Implement role-based route protection ensuring guests can only access guest features (event creation, organizer browsing, bookings, reviews), organizers can only access organizer features (profile management, booking management, portfolio uploads), and admins can only access admin dashboard. Enforce these restrictions on both frontend routing and backend endpoints.

Debug and fix the OrganizerProfileForm component to ensure all form fields (company_name, contact_number, experience_years, pricing_range, description, availability_status) properly capture user input and submit data to the backend
Verify the useSaveOrganizerProfile mutation hook correctly calls the backend saveOrganizerProfile function and handles response data, errors, and loading states appropriately

Ensure the OrganizerDashboard page correctly toggles between profile creation mode (when no profile exists) and profile view/edit mode (when profile exists), and that the edit button properly switches to the OrganizerProfileForm
Create PortfolioUpload component in frontend/src/components/organizer/ that allows organizers to upload multiple portfolio images with file input, preview thumbnails, and upload progress indication
Add React Query mutation hooks useAddPortfolioImage and useGetOrganizerPortfolioImages in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for portfolio image operations
Integrate PortfolioUpload component into OrganizerDashboard page in a dedicated portfolio management section below the profile information
Create PortfolioGallery component in frontend/src/components/organizer/ that displays organizer portfolio images in a responsive grid layout with lightbox functionality for viewing full-size images
Display organizer portfolio images on OrganizerProfileView component and on OrganizerCard when viewing organizer details, showing a preview gallery of their work
Handle portfolio image file uploads by storing images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/portfolios/ directory using generated filenames (organizerId_timestamp_random.ext pattern)
Add contact_number input field to CreateEventForm component (frontend/src/components/events/CreateEventForm.tsx) with validation for required input
Display contact_number field on EventList component cards (frontend/src/components/events/EventList.tsx) so guests can see their contact information on created events

Display guest contact_number in the OrganizerBookingCard component (frontend/src/components/booking/OrganizerBookingCard.tsx) so organizers can see how to contact the event creator when reviewing booking requests

Update the Header component (frontend/src/components/layout/Header.tsx) to replace the current FIESTA text/logo branding with an img element that references /assets/fiesta-logo.png with appropriate alt text and styling

Debug and fix the OrganizerCard component (frontend/src/components/organizer/OrganizerCard.tsx) to ensure the organizer's portfolio image preview is correctly displayed. Verify that the image src attribute uses the correct path format (/assets/portfolios/) and that the first portfolio image is being rendered when available.

Verify the OrganizerProfileView component (frontend/src/components/organizer/OrganizerProfileView.tsx) correctly renders portfolio images in the PortfolioGallery section and that images are accessible at their expected static asset paths.

Inspect the useGetOrganizerPortfolioImages hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to ensure it correctly fetches portfolio image data from the backend and returns the proper filename format that matches the static asset storage structure.

Verify that uploaded portfolio images are actually being saved to the frontend/public/assets/portfolios/ directory with the correct naming convention (organizerId_timestamp_random.ext) and that these files are accessible via the public URL path.

Create a React Query mutation hook useDeletePortfolioImage in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts that calls the backend deletePortfolioImage function and invalidates the portfolio images query cache on success

Update the PortfolioUpload component in frontend/src/components/organizer/PortfolioUpload.tsx to display existing portfolio images with a delete button (X icon or trash icon) for each image thumbnail, using the useDeletePortfolioImage mutation hook to remove images when clicked
When a portfolio image is successfully deleted via the frontend, remove the corresponding image file from the frontend/public/assets/portfolios/ directory to clean up unused static assets

new_feature_requests.summary: User authentication system with role-based access (guest, organizer, admin)
Event creation and management with type, location, guest count, and style filters
Organizer profile management with contact number, experience, pricing, ratings, and portfolio
Side-by-side organizer comparison tool with contact numbers, experience, pricing, ratings, and availability
Booking request system with status tracking (Requested, Approved, Rejected, Completed)
Review and rating system for organizers linked to events
Admin analytics dashboard with user counts, organizer stats, event metrics, and top performers
Intelligent filtering system for organizers based on event requirements
Portfolio image upload and management for organizers
Premium landing page with hero section and navy/white/gold theme

Create review and rating system where guests can submit reviews for organizers after events, including rating (1-5 stars), comment text, and timestamps. Link reviews to event_id, organizer_id, and user_id. Automatically update organizer rating and total_reviews count when new reviews are submitted.

Build portfolio image upload system where organizers can upload multiple portfolio images. Store images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/portfolios with links to organizer_id and upload timestamps. Display portfolio images on organizer profile pages.

Create responsive design system ensuring all pages (landing, dashboards, comparison tables, forms, profiles) work seamlessly on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Use modern button styling, professional tables with clean layouts, and ensure all interactive elements are touch-friendly.

Implement comprehensive input validation for all forms including event creation, organizer profiles, booking requests, and reviews. Validate data types, required fields, email format (case-sensitive), contact number format, rating ranges (1-5), and ensure proper error messaging for validation failures.
Design and render a premium FIESTA logo featuring elegant typography with navy and gold color accents suitable for the landing page hero section and navigation header.

Confirm the backend saveOrganizerProfile function correctly accepts organizer profile data, validates required fields, enforces contact_number uniqueness constraint, and persists the organizer profile to state
Add portfolio_images field to OrganizerProfile type in backend to store an array of image metadata (filename, uploaded_at timestamp) linked to each organizer
Create backend functions to save and retrieve portfolio images for organizers, including addPortfolioImage(filename: Text) and getOrganizerPortfolioImages(organizerId: Principal) functions
Add contact_number field to event creation form so organizers can contact event creators directly
Add contact_number field (text input) to the Event type in backend/main.mo to store the guest's contact information when creating events

Accept a user-provided logo image file and replace the current FIESTA logo in the Header component (frontend/src/components/layout/Header.tsx) with the new logo image stored as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/
Save the uploaded logo image (Fiesta_20260221_085233_0000.jpg) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/fiesta-logo.png
Update the Header component (frontend/src/components/layout/Header.tsx) to replace the current text-based FIESTA branding with an img element referencing /assets/fiesta-logo.png
Save the uploaded logo image (Screenshot_20260221_085729.jpg) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/fiesta-logo.png, ensuring the image maintains its aspect ratio and quality
Add ability for organizers to delete/remove already uploaded portfolio images

Add a backend function deletePortfolioImage(filename: Text) in backend/main.mo that removes the specified portfolio image from the organizer's portfolio_images array and returns a success/failure result
